content:
🌟 oxwm | Zig
🎯 Primary Use Case: A highly configurable and user-friendly dynamic window manager for Linux/Unix-like systems, written in Zig.
✨ Key Features: • Dynamic window management in Zig • Lua API for configuration • Hot-reloading of configuration • LSP-powered autocomplete • Sane defaults
📖 Summary: OXWM is a dynamic window manager written in Zig, offering an enhanced alternative to dwm. It provides a flexible Lua API for configuration with hot-reloading, aiming to reduce user friction through sensible defaults, LSP integration, and instant configuration updates without restarting the X session.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
